    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.convertFromApigee(ApigeeApiConfig config, String proxyName)
    Converts an Apigee proxy bundle by downloading it directly from the Apigee Management API.
    ConversionResult
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.convertFromApigee(ApigeeApiConfig config, String proxyName, ConversionOptions options)
    Converts an Apigee proxy bundle by downloading it directly from the Apigee Management API.
    ConversionResult
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.convertFromApigee(ApigeeApiConfig config, String proxyName, String revision, ConversionOptions options)
    Converts an Apigee proxy bundle by downloading a specific revision from the Apigee Management API.
    ConversionResult
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.convertFromApigeeAndSave(ApigeeApiConfig config, String proxyName, String revision, Path outputPath, ConversionOptions options)
    Converts a specific revision of an Apigee proxy and saves the result to a file.
    ConversionResult
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.convertFromApigeeAndSave(ApigeeApiConfig config, String proxyName, Path outputPath, ConversionOptions options)
    Converts an Apigee proxy and saves the result to a file.
    String
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.convertFromApigeeToJson(ApigeeApiConfig config, String proxyName)
    Converts an Apigee proxy and returns the OpenAPI spec as a JSON string.
    String
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.convertFromApigeeToYaml(ApigeeApiConfig config, String proxyName)
    Converts an Apigee proxy and returns the OpenAPI spec as a YAML string.
    ApigeeManagementApiClient
    ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.createApiClient(ApigeeApiConfig config)
    Creates an ApigeeManagementApiClient using the provided configuration.
